reviews.author: Akumar
reviews.review_body: Very good school but it has to improve the compititiveness with other school and improve faculty. The previous faculty like ruby teacher..bharti teacher..shyaam sir etc.. where such a great teachers compared to teachers from now

reviews.author: Madhusudhan Reddy
reviews.review_body: I am a student of bric Paris high school I have been studied from nursery to 10th one of the best and oldest school with great education and lots of enjoyment  I'm feeling  proud that I have studied in parsi school so HAPPY and all  the best for future children hope you all have a great future

reviews.author: Sumaiya
reviews.review_body: My name is sumaiya ...I studied in this school from 2 ND cls to 10 cls and  teachers are very good and teacher are very friendly and at studies they are strict too

reviews.author: thug life
reviews.review_body:
Best school ever!!
Teachers are very friendly!!
Good fee structure!!
Awesome environment!!

I have completed my schooling from this school..!!

I loved the manegment of the school by miss vaijayanti !!

And the one thing which I find should be improved is, teachers should teach manners to male students those who are misbehaved!!
And teachers like anil sir and Kavita mam(social)
should show more concentration towards teaching,rather than just coming and just completing there portion!!
